gdpr.double_opt_in_help: Abaxhasi abaqinisekisile ukuthatha kwabo inxaxheba nge-URL yokuqinisekisa ye-imeyile.
gdpr.opt_in_help: Abaxhasi abakhethe ukubhalisa kwiwijethi ('Ewe, ndifuna ukufumana ii-imeyile' iqhosha lerediyo)
gdpr.opt_out_warning: Ndiyazi ukuba akukho mthethweni ukunxibelelana nabasebenzisi abangakhange bavume ngokucacileyo, ngaphandle kweemeko ezimbalwa kakhulu ezivumelekileyo.
gdpr.opt_out_help: Abaxhasi abangafuni ukufumana incwadana yeendaba ('Hayi, andifuni kufumana ii-imeyile' iqhosha lerediyo kwi-widget okanye i-URL yokuphuma kwi-imeyile).

exportType.activities_help: Izinto ezithunyelwe ngaphandle ezenziwe ngabasebenzisi, ezifana nokusayina, ukwabelana, njl.

export.errorPermission: Awunalo imvume yokuthumela ngaphandle idatha yale mbutho.
export.csv_help: I-CSV yifomathi eqhelekileyo. Sebenzisa le ngaphandle kokuba ngokukodwa ufuna i-JSON.
export.key_help: Ukuba idatha yakho ifihliwe, layisha isitshixo sokufihla phambi kokuyithumela ngaphandle.
export.title: Thumela ngaphandle idatha yamalungu

invite.title: Mema ukuba ujoyine {{org}}
invite.default:
Umenyiwe ukuba ujoyine i-akhawunti ye- {{org}} kwideshbhodi ye-Fix the Status Quo.

Le memo iza kusebenza kwiiyure ezingama-24 ezizayo. Nceda uyamkele ngokukhawuleza kangangoko.

Siyavuya kakhulu ukuba ujoyine!

campaigner.description: Ungabona kwaye ulawule izenzo, abaxhasi, kunye nedatha yephulo. Awunakutshintsha useto lombutho okanye uthumele ngaphandle idatha.
campaigner.label: Umkhankaseli

owner.description: Ufikelelo olupheleleyo lolawulo. Unokulawula yonke into, kuquka izicwangciso, amaphulo, ukuthunyelwa kwedatha, kunye nokufihla idatha.
owner.label: Umnini

coordinator.description: Ungabona idatha yabaxhasi kodwa awukwazi ukwenza amaphulo okanye ulawule izicwangciso, okanye uthumele idatha ngaphandle.
coordinator.label: Umlungelelanisi

invite.subject: Isimemo sokujoyina i {{org}} kwideshbhodi ye-Fix the Status Quo
invite.emailHelper: Siza kuthumela i-imeyile yesimemo enekhonkco lokujoyina kwangoko.
invite.sentInstructions: Ungakwazi nokwabelana ngamakhonkco angezantsi ngokuthe ngqo:
invite.tooltip: Qaphela: Kuphela 'umnini' onokukwazi ukuthumela ngaphandle idatha yabaxhasi.
invite.translator:
Molo,

Siyakumema ukuba usebenzisane nathi ekuguquleleni nasekuphuculeni ileta yephulo yelizwe lakho. Ukuqonda kwakho imeko yezopolitiko yasekuhlaleni kuya kuba luncedo kakhulu — kungekuphela ekuguquleleni, kodwa nasekuqinisekiseni ukuba umyalezo uchukumisa ngokufanelekileyo abaxhasi.

Le leta yahlulwe yaba ngamacandelo aliqela, icandelo ngalinye linenguqulelo ezininzi. Abaxhasi baya kufumana iinguqulelo ezidityaniswe ngokungacwangciswanga ukuze kwandiswe intatho-nxaxheba nokuphepha ukuba umyalezo ungahoywa ngabamkeli.

Kwangoko wakwamkela isimemo, uza kukwazi ukufikelela kwileta [apha]({{location}}). **Ungalibali ukugcina emva kokuba wenze utshintsho lwakho!**

Nje ukuba igalelo lakho ligqityiwe, nceda usazise kunye nomququzeleli ukuze sikwazi ukusasaza uhlaziyo.

Siyawuxabisa ixesha lakho nobuchule bakho — lo ngumzamo wethu sonke wokuqinisa impembelelo yephulo.

**Ngenxa yokhuseleko, ikhonkco lakho lokungena kwisimemo liza kuphelelwa lixesha kwiiyure eziyi-24.**

organisation.collectsEmail: Awunayo i-newsletter kwaye awufuni kuqokelela iidilesi ze-imeyile? (Uza kukwazi ukuzifihla ngokwakho le nto kwiwebhusayithi yakho) Phawula le bhokisi:
organisation.collectsEmailHelper: Andinayo i-newsletter. Ndiqinisekile andifuni ibhokisi yokukhetha ye-newsletter eqokelela iidilesi ze-imeyile esinokuzisebenzisa kamva.
organisation.doubleOptIn: Abaxhasi bam kufuneka baqinisekise kabini ukuze bafumane incwadana yeendaba.
organisation.organisationHelper: Uvela kweliphi icandelo losapho? Samkela onke amaziko!
organisation.remarks: Ngaba kukho izimvo onazo ngesixhobo ofuna ukusixelela zona?

onboarding.embargoHelper: Ndiyavuma ukuba izixhobo zephulo zivaliwe ngokungqongqo de kubekho esinye isaziso. Ndiyavuma ukuba andizukwabelana ngezi zixhobo nabani na ongaphandle kombutho wam.
onboarding.login: Bhalisa njengomsebenzisi okanye ungene ngeenkcukacha zakho zamaqonga onxibelelwano okanye i-imeyile yakho. Le yakhawunti yakho buqu, uya kukwazi ukuseka umbutho wakho emva kokuba ubhalisile.
onboarding.maillingHelper: Ngokungenisa le fomu, ndiyavuma ukuba ndifakwe kuluhlu lwe-imeyile lwe- {{campaign}}. Ndingazikhupha nanini na.
onboarding.title: Zibandakanye nalo phulo lwentsebenziswano: lufake lula kwiwebhusayithi yakho.
onboarding.verify: I-imeyile yakho ayikangqiniswanga. Nceda ujonge i-imeyile yakho uze ucofe ikhonkco lokuqinisekisa ukuze uqhubeke.

warning.is_coordinator: Awunakuzimanya naphulo phantsi kwe-akhawunti ka-{{org}}, ngumququzeleli we-{{campaign}}.

onboarding.welcome: Wamkelekile kwindawo yamaqabane yale phulo elilungelelaniswe ngu {{coordinator}}
onboarding.done: Uza kufumana umyalezo wokuqinisekisa nge-imeyile. Sele unako ukufaka inguqulelo yovavanyo ye-<1>widget kwiwebhusayithi yakho</1>
onboarding.intro:
Amaphulo anamandla ngakumbi xa kukho imibutho emininzi esebenzisana kunye ngenjongo efanayo. Eli lithuba lakho lokuba liqabane kwaye ukhulise impembelelo yakho, ngelixa ugcina ulawulo olupheleleyo kumyalezo wakho, uphawu lwakho, kunye neenkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zabaxhasi bakho.

[Xa ujoyina iphulo](https://fixthestatusquo.com/help/for-partners/), ufumana ithuba lokuzilungiselela eyakho i-'widget' yephulo leProca ekulula ukuyisebenzisa. Le widget iquka ifomu yokuqokelela izenzo zabaxhasi (iisayino zecela, imiyalezo ethunyelwe kwixhoba, njl.njl.) kunye nesenzo sokwabelana esikrelekrele esivumela abasayinileyo ukuba babelane ngephulo baze bafumane inkxaso engakumbi.

Zonke izenzo zabaxhasi ezivela kuzo zonke ii-widgets ezingamahlakani zibalwa kunye, zifaka isandla kwisibali sesiphulo esabelwana ngaso. Oko kudala umfutho obonakalayo wobumbano kwaye kubonisa amandla okwenene abantu abanabo xa sisebenza kunye. Kwangelo xesha, iqabane ngalinye ligcina iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zabaxhasi balo, kwaye akukho mfuneko yokwabelana ngedatha entsonkothileyo.

I-widget isebenza ngeelwimi ezininzi kwaye kulula ukuyilungisa ngemibala yakho kunye nelogo yakho. Ukuyifaka kwiphepha lakho kuthatha umzuzu nje omnye, kwaye kulula njengokufaka ividiyo ye-YouTube. Akukho buchule bobugcisa bufunekayo (kwaye ukuba ufuna naluphi na uncedo, [iqela leProca liza kukuxhasa](mailto:support@fixthestatusquo.org))!

I-Proca ithatha ukhuseleko lwedatha yabaxhasi ngokungathí sina. Iiseva zethu ezinikezelweyo eJamani ziyahlangabezana ngokupheleleyo nemigaqo ye-GDPR, kwaye umbutho wakho uhlala nguwona kuphela unini wedatha eqokelelwe nge-widget yakho. Ungabeka iliso kwintsebenzo yephulo lakho kwaye ukhuphele idatha nangaliphi na ixesha, usebenzisa i-dashboard yethu ekulula ukuyisebenzisa. Singakwazi nokudibanisa ngokuthe ngqo nenkqubo yakho yokuthumela i-imeyile.

Amaqabane angaphezu kwama-450 sele esebenzisa iProca kwiphulo lawo le-intanethi, bekhulisa isiseko sabaxhasi babo, kwaye bedala intshukumo eyomeleleyo, enentsebenziswano ngakumbi. Sikunye, singadala uhlobo loxinzelelo oluphumelelisa amaphulo. Sijoyine!

createOrg.intro: Eyona ndlela ikhawulezayo kukuqala nge-akhawunti kaTwitter yombutho wakho (ukuba unezininzi, khetha enye).

join.goalHelper: Olu qikelelo luza kubonwa ngumlungelelanisi kuphela… kwaye siyazi ukuba kunzima ukuqikelela.
join.goal: Ulinganisa bangaphi abantu abaza kuthatha amanyathelo nge-website yakho?
join.request: Ingaba ucwangcisa ukuthumela iimpepha ezikhethekileyo kubaxhasi bakho? Ingaba ukwacwangcisa nemisebenzi yamakhasi onxibelelwano, kuquka iintengiso ezihlawulelwayo?

Used to pre-fill name, description and l: Isetyenziselwa ukufaka kwangaphambili igama, inkcazelo kunye nelogo yombutho wakho.
You can register an new organisation to: Ungabhalisa umbutho omtsha ukuze ujoyine umanyano.
